title: This project presents a Stock Price Prediction Web Application that forecasts future stock
abstract: prices using deep learning models. The application is built with FastAPI as the backend framework and TensorFlow for machine learning model development. title: In today's fast-growing digital economy, businesses generate a massive amount of sales data through online
abstract: platforms, retail stores, and customer interactions. Effectively analyzing this data is essential for improving sales performance, understanding customer needs, and making strategic business decisions. However, traditional sales analysis techniques often fail to provide real-time insights, accurate predictions, and detailed performance evaluation. This limitation results in poor inventory planning, revenue loss, and reduced customer satisfaction.

title: Nowadays, digital images are a main source of shared information in social media. Meanwhile,
abstract: malicious software can forge such images for fake information. So, it’s crucial to identify these forgeries. This problem was tackled in the literature by various digital image forgery detection techniques. But most of these techniques are tied to detecting only one type of forgery, such as image splicing or copy-move that is not applied in real life. abstract: transactions. Detecting fraudulent transactions manually is difficult and time-consuming.
